steps.title: Identify the key requirement
steps.content: The claim requires “explicitly indicates when and how she is shifting the focus of the narrative”—she must directly state the shift.

steps.title: Evaluate the quotations
steps.content: Choice D states “I will now stop writing about myself and family and tribe customs, and tell about the wars... I will jump over about six years.” This directly names the shift (personal/family → wars), when (now), and how (jumping years). The other choices recount events (A), make general observations (B), or use rhetorical questions (C), none of which explicitly announce a narrative shift. That matches choice D — D is correct.
